question: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $70,000 on April 20?

fragility_points: Single-minute settlement timing creates path dependence.
Exchange-specific source-of-truth means Binance-specific anomalies matter more than broader market averages.
key_assumptions: BTC does not fall roughly 5.8% or more from the current ~74.3k Binance level into the exact settlement minute.
No Binance-specific pricing anomaly or operational issue distorts the relevant 12:00 ET candle.
No major macro or crypto-specific shock arrives before Apr 20 that materially changes short-horizon downside odds.
main_logical_chain: Verify the contract mechanics: Binance BTCUSDT, 12:00 ET on Apr 20, final 1-minute candle close must be strictly above 70,000.
Verify current Binance context: BTCUSDT is already around 74.3k and recent daily closes are above 70k.
Apply outside-view reasoning: with only five days remaining, maintaining an already-cleared threshold is more likely than not at high probability unless a meaningful downside shock occurs.
Retain residual No probability because this is a narrow timestamp-specific and exchange-specific contract.
payload.main_thesis: BTC is already materially above 70k on Binance, so the short-horizon outside-view favors a Yes resolution unless a roughly 5.8% downside move or exchange-specific settlement-minute anomaly occurs before Apr 20 noon ET.
quote_anchors: This market will resolve to 'Yes' if the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) ... has a final 'Close' price higher than the price specified in the title.
payload.source_quality_view: High relevance and adequate quality: Polymarket rules provide the contract mechanics, and Binance provides the named source-of-truth family and live price context; independence is only medium because the best evidence is concentrated on the named exchange.
strongest_disconfirmers: The contract is settled by one exact Binance BTCUSDT 12:00 ET 1-minute candle close, so a temporary dip at the settlement minute can still produce No.
strongest_supports: Binance BTCUSDT was around 74.3k on Apr 15, already comfortably above the 70k threshold.
Recent Binance daily closes for Apr 13-15 were above 70k.
Short-horizon threshold markets usually favor the already-in-the-money side absent a clear catalyst or mechanics trap.
payload.timing_relevance: The market resolves at Apr 20 12:00 ET, so only the exact noon ET 1-minute candle close matters; five days remain from the analysis date.
unresolved_ambiguities: Polymarket cites the Binance website candle display as the formal settlement surface, while verification here used Binance docs/API as close source-family checks rather than the literal final chart print.
payload.what_would_change_view: A decisive move back toward 71k or below, a new near-term macro/crypto shock, or evidence of Binance-specific settlement fragility would lower the estimate.
